tree.name: Julian Phillips
tree.tradeDescription: Acquired alongside Ayo Dosunmu from Bulls for Rob Dillingham, Leonard Miller, and 4 second-round picks
tree.note: Tennessee forward, 2023 2nd round pick (#35). Same trade as Dosunmu.

assetsGivenUp.name: Rob Dillingham
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded a 2030 1st round pick swap right and 2031 unprotected 1st round pick to SAS for Rob Dillingham (#8 overall)
assetsGivenUp.note: Kentucky guard, selected #8 by SAS, traded to MIN. Shared cost — see min-ayo-dosunmu.json for full asset tree

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2031 unprotected 1st round pick, sent to SAS

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 1st Round Pick Swap
assetsGivenUp.note: Right for SAS to swap 1st round picks with MIN in 2030

assetsGivenUp.name: Leonard Miller
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded UTA 2026 2nd round pick and MIN 2028 2nd round pick to SAS for Leonard Miller (#33)
assetsGivenUp.note: Canadian forward, selected #33 by SAS, traded to MIN. Shared cost — see min-ayo-dosunmu.json

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick via UTA
assetsGivenUp.note: Utah's 2026 2nd, from Conley 3-team trade. See min-ayo-dosunmu.json for full chain.

assetsGivenUp.name: D'Angelo Russell
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost. Full chain in min-ayo-dosunmu.json: Wiggins (draft #1) + 2021 1st (#7 Kuminga) + 2021 2nd (#36 McBride)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Minnesota's own 2028 2nd round pick, sent to SAS for Miller

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick (least favorable DEN/GSW)
assetsGivenUp.note: Least favorable of Denver or Golden State 2026 2nd round picks. Accumulated through multiple prior trades.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick via CLE
assetsGivenUp.note: Cleveland's 2027 2nd round pick. Exact acquisition trade unverified on BBRef.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 2nd Round Pick (most favorable MIN/GSW)
assetsGivenUp.note: Most favorable of MIN own or GSW 2031 2nd. GSW swap right from Kyle Anderson 6-team trade. Base pick is MIN's own.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2032 2nd Round Pick (most favorable PHX/HOU)
assetsGivenUp.note: Most favorable of Phoenix or Houston 2032 2nd round picks. Exact acquisition trade unverified on BBRef.
